market_pulse: Competitive nightclubs showcasing heavy talent lineups for summer season; LIV matching energy with David Guetta exclusive residency and strong EDC Week presence positioning well for June momentum.

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily leveraging short-form video audio trending on TikTok around pool party season (#vegaspool, #dayparty, #poolseason) with high-energy EDM snippets
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 30-second pool-party audio hooks from LIV Beach lineup DJs; push to TikTok weekly

content_gaps.description: XS, OMNIA, and Zouk actively tagging celebrity sightings and influencer features in stories; LIV less visible in creator collabs outside direct DJ partnerships
content_gaps.suggested_action: Identify 5-10 Vegas-based micro-influencers (50k-200k followers) for LIV Beach/Nightclub takeovers during peak weekends

content_gaps.description: TAO and Encore spotlighting setup, VIP prep, and staff stories; LIV relying more on live event content than lifestyle BTS
content_gaps.suggested_action: Commission 2x weekly BTS reels from LIV Beach daylife (cabana setup, mixologist features, soundcheck)
